title: FizzBuzz
description: Write a function that prints the numbers from 1 to n. For multiples of 3, print 'Fizz' instead of the number. For multiples of 5, print 'Buzz'. For multiples of both, print 'FizzBuzz'.

test_cases.expected_output:
1
2
Fizz
4
Buzz
Fizz
7
8
Fizz
Buzz
11
Fizz
13
14
FizzBuzz
